## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`

## Checklist

- [ ] Public docs/examples updated when needed
- [ ] Accessibility implications reviewed
- [ ] New exports are additive or clearly justified
